transition: ms=+1 near 3.875 GHz in current field setup
contrast_basis: current setup reference from NV_RESEARCH_MEMORY: mS=0 to mS=+1 PL contrast about 22%
distinguishability: Expected resonant dip about 22% is roughly 98x the binomial shot-noise floor and spans about 4.6 frequency steps; a usable aligned resonance in-window should be visible in raw/readout-aware review.
readout_role_from_xml: Rabimodulated.xml with full_expt=0 records first detection as mS=0 reference and final detection after length_rabi_pulse as signal; no mS=+1 reference detection is active.
normalization_rule: Judge signal presence from raw signal and fitted-reference-normalized views; do not promote point-wise normalization-only features.
